builds.summary: Signed CI build artifacts and checksums must be attached for the frozen release SHA.

migrations.summary: Production-like migration deploy log and rollback compatibility decision are required.

billingJourney.summary: Connected PostgreSQL signup-to-paid-GST-invoice and dunning recovery acceptance passed locally.

securityScans.summary: Local secret, boundary, dependency and SBOM checks pass; signed CI SAST evidence is still required.

externalPenetrationTest.summary: Independent report and closure evidence for every critical/high finding are required.

managedBackupPitr.summary: Managed snapshot restore and timestamp PITR must record measured RPO/RTO.

retentionPartitions.summary: Retention dry run and partition boundary probes passed locally.

productionLikeLoad.summary: All five k6 profiles must pass target rates and durations in an isolated production-like environment.

providerOutageDunning.summary: Provider transport failure, durable dunning, suspension, audit reconciliation and recovery passed locally.

monitoringAlertReceipt.summary: A production-like Sentry issue, OTel trace and on-call alert receipt must be captured.

privacyStoreApproval.summary: Privacy/DPA text, background-location declaration and Android/iOS store reviews require approval.

deploymentRollback.summary: Production-like progressive deploy and schema-compatible rollback rehearsal must be recorded.
